changes_made: Changed k8s_configuration_management_tool_integration to k8s_config_management_tool_integration for consistency with resource naming conventions
review_notes: The control CM-6-c is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves configuration management, which is critical for maintaining secure and compliant environments. The functions proposed are relevant but required minor naming adjustments for consistency. The use of 'config' instead of 'configuration' aligns better with existing naming patterns.
naming_improvements: Use 'config' instead of 'configuration' for resource name to maintain consistency with existing patterns
title: Configuration Settings - Identify, document, and approve any...
step1_reasoning: The control CM-6-c focuses on identifying, documenting, and approving configuration settings, which can be mapped to ensuring that Kubernetes configurations are managed and compliant. This involves integrating configuration management tools that can automate compliance checks, validating pod and node configurations against approved settings, and using admission controllers to enforce configuration policies.
